description: Deprecate the root back-compat symlinks (install -> .oh/install, scripts -> .oh/scripts) introduced in #321 by repointing every functional consumer to the real .oh/ paths, then removing the symlinks. Authoritative inventory: tasks/deprecate-oh-symlinks/blast-radius.md (Categories A-I + FORBIDDEN + verification). Delivered via PR #323; all CI green.

userStories.title: T-A: Repoint build and test config
userStories.description: As the harness, I want the Makefile and vitest config to reference .oh/scripts directly so build/test work without the root symlink.
acceptanceCriteria: Makefile L9/L13/L53: scripts/docker-compose.sh and scripts/harness-config.sh repointed to .oh/scripts/...
vitest.config.ts L6 include is '.oh/scripts/__tests__/**/*.test.ts'
grep -n 'scripts/' Makefile shows only .oh/scripts/ paths
grep -n '"scripts/' vitest.config.ts returns empty
npx vitest run resolves the .oh/scripts/__tests__ suite
ONLY Makefile and vitest.config.ts are modified by this story
userStories.notes: DONE (worker a0086d6). Makefile L9/L13/L53 + vitest.config.ts L6 repointed. Changing the vitest include glob exposed Category I (test-suite depth) — see US-009.

userStories.title: T-B: Repoint devcontainer runtime boot path
userStories.description: As the sandbox boot path, I want entrypoint and compose to reference .oh/ directly so the container boots healthy without the root symlink.
acceptanceCriteria: entrypoint.sh references .oh/install/banner.sh and .oh/scripts/cron-runtime.ts
docker-compose.yml healthcheck references /home/sandbox/harness/.oh/scripts/sandbox-healthcheck.sh
bash -n .devcontainer/entrypoint.sh exits 0
no remaining harness/scripts or harness/install bare refs
ONLY .devcontainer/entrypoint.sh and .devcontainer/docker-compose.yml are modified
userStories.notes: DONE (worker a3756ae). entrypoint L190/194/195 + L287/310 comments + L320/337; docker-compose L64/L14. Validated end-to-end by sandbox-boot-guard CI booting the container with symlinks removed.

userStories.title: T-CD: Repoint CI workflows and update eval probes atomically
userStories.description: As CI, I want workflow script paths/filters and the probes that assert them to reference .oh/ together so CI stays green and probes stay non-REGRESSION.
acceptanceCriteria: ci-harness.yml / release.yml / sandbox-boot-guard.yml: shellcheck globs, bash calls, and path filters repointed to .oh/ (redundant scripts/**, install/** dropped)
boot-lint-glob.sh and sandbox-boot-guard-ci.sh updated to assert the new .oh/ strings
grep -n '"install/**"' workflows returns empty; grep 'bash scripts/' workflows returns empty
bash evals/probes/boot-lint-glob.sh and sandbox-boot-guard-ci.sh exit 0
ONLY the 3 workflow files and 2 probe files are modified
userStories.notes: DONE (worker a9b4b6e). 3 workflows + boot-lint-glob.sh + sandbox-boot-guard-ci.sh. Probes green in CI Eval Probe Regression Gate.

userStories.title: T-E: Repoint skills and crons that exec root paths
userStories.description: As a skill/cron running inside the sandbox, I want bare scripts/ exec forms repointed to .oh/scripts/ so they resolve without the root symlink.
acceptanceCriteria: Bare/$HARNESS/$REPO_ROOT/$ROOT exec+source forms repointed to .oh/scripts/... in autopilot/SKILL.md, autopilot-caps.sh, context-audit/SKILL.md, eval/run.sh, health-check/SKILL.md, retro/SKILL.md, crons/autopilot.md, crons/prompt-miner.md
${CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR}/scripts/... references NOT modified
crons/heartbeat.md NOT modified
bash -n clean on autopilot-caps.sh and eval/run.sh
ONLY the 8 listed files are modified
userStories.notes: DONE (worker af79689). 8 files. Skill mirrors (.claude/.pi/.codex skills) update automatically via the existing skills symlink. heartbeat.md untouched (forbidden).

userStories.title: T-F: Repoint user-facing docs
userStories.description: As a self-hosting user, I want install/healthcheck commands in docs to use .oh/ so copy-paste works after the symlink is gone.
acceptanceCriteria: README.md / docs/installation.md / docs/quickstart.md: 'bash scripts/install.sh' -> 'bash .oh/scripts/install.sh'
docs/installation.md: harness/scripts/sandbox-healthcheck.sh -> .oh/scripts/...
grep -n 'bash scripts/' returns empty across the three files
ONLY README.md, docs/installation.md, docs/quickstart.md are modified
userStories.notes: DONE (worker abe3408). 7 edits. curl|bash one-liners and hosted-installer URLs left as-is (not the moved machinery). Build docs CI green.

userStories.title: T-G: Update misc references (protected-paths, context, AGENTS)

acceptanceCriteria: .claude/protected-paths.txt install/scripts machinery entries -> .oh/...
context/SOUL.md, TOOLS.md, REPO_MAP.md, AGENTS.md machinery-path mentions -> .oh/...
issue templates area lists updated; dead packages/ token dropped
ONLY the owned files are modified
userStories.notes: DONE (worker a84145c). protected-paths + SOUL/TOOLS/REPO_MAP + AGENTS.md + feat.md. NOTE: REPO_MAP.md edit pushed it 12 bytes over the 12288 byte budget (repo-orientation probe) — orchestrator trimmed the clause back to 12210 bytes.

userStories.title: T-REMOVE: Remove symlinks, add CHANGELOG entry, final verification
userStories.description: As the harness, I want the two root symlinks removed and the full verification suite green so the migration is complete and durable.
acceptanceCriteria: git rm install scripts; ls install scripts errors (No such file)
Exactly one new CHANGELOG [Unreleased] entry; no history altered
npx vitest run green except the pre-existing env-only buildTmuxWrapper failure
evals/probes/*.sh no new REGRESSION (wiki-readme-index fails only on pre-existing dirty gitignored corpus)
bash .oh/scripts/docker-compose.sh config --quiet exits 0; REPO_DIR resolves to true root
bash -n clean on all edited shell scripts
Committed + pushed; PR opened against development; CI green
userStories.notes: DONE (orchestrator). Symlinks removed (commit e872df6). PR #323 -> development, MERGEABLE, ALL CI GREEN (sandbox-boot-guard booted the container symlink-free; Lint/Typecheck/Build/Test green incl. vitest; Eval Probe Regression Gate green; Boot Path Lint; Build docs). Forbidden files never staged. Known operator follow-up: crons/heartbeat.md bare scripts/ refs (excluded; carries uncommitted operator state).

userStories.title: Category H (discovered): machinery self-location + remaining probes
userStories.description: As the boot path, I want machinery scripts to derive repo-root correctly without the symlink's logical-pwd trick, and all remaining eval probes to reference .oh/.
acceptanceCriteria: docker-compose.sh, sandbox-boot-smoke.sh, check-pnpm-pin.sh, ablate.sh, install.sh, sandbox-healthcheck.sh, restart-openharness-tmux.sh: $SCRIPT_DIR/.. -> $SCRIPT_DIR/../.. (true .oh/scripts depth) + internal $REPO_*/scripts -> .oh/scripts
7 additional probes ($ROOT/scripts/...) + prompt-miner/scripts/render-log-entry.sh repointed; probes that grep migrated files updated to expect .oh/ strings
bash -n clean; full probe suite no new REGRESSION
userStories.notes: DONE (orchestrator did Category H machinery; worker aa2c31d did the probe sweep). NOT in the original ralph plan — surfaced by running vitest/auditing machinery. This was the boot-critical core: #321's symlink masked these by making pwd report the 2-level path.

userStories.title: Category I (discovered): vitest suite path-depth correction
userStories.description: As the test suite, I want repo-root computed from the real .oh/scripts/__tests__ depth so tests pass without the symlink.
acceptanceCriteria: 16 files under .oh/scripts/__tests__/: root def '../..' -> '../../..'
machinery refs join(ROOT,'scripts',...) -> join(ROOT,'.oh','scripts',...); readRepoFile('install'|'scripts',...) -> '.oh' prefixed; cron-runtime.test.ts:919 cwd-relative path -> .oh/scripts
content assertions (compose-args, entrypoint, sandbox-healthcheck) updated to .oh/ strings
npx vitest run green except the pre-existing env-only buildTmuxWrapper failure
userStories.notes: DONE (worker a731c9d). NOT in the original ralph plan — surfaced when US-001's vitest glob change broke 12 suites whose root math assumed the symlink depth. vitest green in CI confirms.
